name: canshare-tnm8-haematology-non-mf-or-ss-pn
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) haematology primary cutaneous B cell or T cell (non MF/SS) lymphoma pathological N category
description: A pathological regional lymph node stage (pN) of a cutaneous B cell or T cell lymphoma (non mycosis fungoides and non sezary syndrome), using the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
